_rationale: code_insight mode=unified produces a LCF payload concatenating REPOSITORY MAP + HEALTH + MODULES + STATISTICS sections — the widest mode. After iter-5 fix (task AQQfI8XEEkV6), C++ emits a byte-identical 654-byte payload to Go on multi-lang corpus including the four section headers, complexity/coupling/cohesion/quality lines, and the multi-lang module summary. Locks the most cross-section-prone mode: a regression in any of the four section emitters would surface here as a stable-tier mismatch. Probe: /tmp/parity-iter4/code_insight___mode___unified.{go,cpp}.json both 654 bytes after rebuild.

tiers._rationale_stable: Envelope matches MCP spec. result.content[].text is byte-for-byte identical on multi-lang — the four LCF sections (REPOSITORY MAP, HEALTH, MODULES, STATISTICS) emit identically on both sides. This is the strongest single test of the per-section LCF emitters.
